description: Product Description OLEVS-Men's Slimline Waterproof Dress Wrist Watches OLEVS OLEVS devoted themselves to design a fashionable and high-performance ultra-thin watches which is an ideal companion for any occasion and its unique texture enables you to easily spice up a normal outfit and add style to your life. Its lightweight stainless steel case, comfortable leather strap，provide a better wearing experience. Travel Watch It's very light weight 35G, so you can take it to any place. You can wear it if you do anything, it won't affect any of your actions. The watch will be the good friend with you. Adjustable Watchband If you want to send it to you friend as a gift, you don't worry the wear length, the adjust watchband suit for the majority of wrist. (Watchband length 168mm to 217mm/6.6inch to 8.5inch) Suit for business suit & T-shirt You can use it on business & casual daily, a dress wristwatch can be took in work/ travel/ festival...An ideal gift on birthday/ Christmas/ father’s day/ New year/ Best man's gifts. The OLEVS crafted in elegant designs, superior aesthetic appeal and supreme comfort.Suitable for business, leisure, sports, travel is wear. You can give it as a gift to your brothers and sisters and lovers at Christmas, Valentine's Day. In fact, we are focused on young people fashion. We are focus on design the cost-effective watches, they are not expensive, but they are fashionable and durable.
